name: Baked Sour Cream Tacos - Tacos De Jocoqui Al Horno
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Salsa Jalapena or your-favorite chili relish
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sauce, wilt onion in hot oil.
2. Add chopped tomatoes, oregano, salsa, and salt. Cook for 15 or twenty minutes.
3. Set aside.
4. Fry tortillas lightly in oil.
5. Place a piece of cheese on each tortilla and roll them up.
6. Arrange the rolled tacos in a buttered shallow glass baking dish.
7. Pour the remaining sauce over the tacos, top with additional cheese, and spoon sour cream over all.
8. Bake at 325°F for 25 to 30 minutes. Serves 6 to 12.
